_comment: Routing eval cases. positive[] = realistic user asks that MUST route to the owning skill (owner ranks top_k, default 3). negative[] = asks owned by a sibling skill; the sibling (owner) MUST outrank this skill. Paraphrase how users talk — never copy the description. Every skill in src/skills/ must have an entry (run-evals enforces coverage).
